  "findings": [
    "The staged wire connectors (wirenuts) are incorrectly sized for the combination and gauge of conductors to be spliced."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the incorrectly sized wirenuts from the work area.",
    "Select and supply wirenuts listed and rated for the specific wire gauge and quantity combination being spliced."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under NEC 110.14, terminals and splicing devices must be identified for the use. Using an incorrectly sized wirenut can lead to loose connections, high resistance, arcing, and potential fire hazards. Because the wrong materials are staged for installation, the current setup fails compliance.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 110.14",
    "NEC 110.14(B)"
  ]
}
